name: Java 8 (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Java 8 syntax, OOP concepts, collections, exception handling, and functional programming features such as lambdas and streams. Suitable for screening Java developer candidates.

name: Core Java (Entry Level)
description: Assesses fundamental Java programming knowledge including variables, control structures, arrays, basic OOP, and simple debugging for entry-level or graduate developer roles.

name: Java Design Patterns
description: Evaluates a candidate's understanding of common design patterns (Singleton, Factory, Observer, Strategy) as applied in Java, aimed at senior or lead developer hiring.

name: Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures fluid intelligence and pattern recognition through interactive puzzles. Useful as a general cognitive screen across all job levels including technical roles.

name: Verify - Numerical Reasoning
description: Assesses the ability to interpret numerical and statistical data, commonly used for analyst, finance, and data-driven technical roles.

name: OPQ32 - Occupational Personality Questionnaire
description: A comprehensive workplace personality assessment covering 32 dimensions of typical behavioral style, used across all levels for culture-fit and leadership potential evaluation.

name: Situational Judgement Test - Technology Professionals
description: Presents realistic workplace scenarios common in software teams (deadline conflicts, code review disagreements, stakeholder communication) to assess judgement and decision-making of technical candidates.

name: Python (New)
description: Tests core Python programming knowledge: syntax, data structures, OOP, error handling, and standard library usage for developer hiring at entry to mid level.

name: SQL (New)
description: Evaluates SQL query writing ability including joins, aggregations, subqueries, and schema design, relevant for backend and full-stack developer roles.

name: Full Stack Developer Simulation
description: A realistic coding simulation covering front-end (JavaScript) and back-end (Java or Python) tasks to evaluate end-to-end development capability.

name: Agile Software Development
description: Measures familiarity with Agile/Scrum practices and judgement in sprint-planning and team-collaboration scenarios, for developers working in Agile environments.

name: Graduate 8.0 Job Focused Assessment
description: A blended assessment for graduate hiring combining cognitive ability, personality, and situational judgement to predict early-career job performance.

name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
description: Assesses logical reasoning and the ability to draw sound conclusions from given information, used broadly across technical and analytical roles.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests JavaScript fundamentals including DOM manipulation, async programming, closures, and ES6+ syntax for front-end or full-stack developer screening.

name: Leadership Development Report
description: Provides insight into leadership style and potential, drawing on personality data to support senior and managerial hiring or development decisions.
